{{ review.site_user.name }} · {{ review.created_at|date:"Y-m-d H:i" }}
{{ review.avg_rating }} ★
{% include "marketplace/includes/review_item_thumb.html" with item_image=s.item_image css_class="vpr-thumb" %}
{{ s.item_name }}
{{ s.channel }} #{{ s.order_number }} {% trans "Qty" %} ×{{ s.quantity }} {% trans "Ordered" %} {{ s.order_placed|date:"Y-m-d" }} {% trans "Delivered" %} {{ s.delivered_at|date:"Y-m-d" }} {% for line in s.attributes %} {{ line }} {% endfor %}
{% trans "Product" %} {{ review.rating_product }}★ · {% trans "Service" %} {{ review.rating_service }}★ · {% trans "Delivery" %} {{ review.rating_delivery }}★
{% if review.message %}
{{ review.message }}
{% endif %} {% if review.images %}
{% for im in review.images %} {% if im|slice:":4" == "http" or im|slice:":2" == "//" %} {% elif im|slice:":1" == "/" %} {% else %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% endwith %} {% endfor %}
{% endblock %}
